_comment_mtls: mTLS: use_default_eng_ca is intentionally UNSET so the embedded PROD Tesla CA verifies the car's client cert (RequireAndVerifyClientCert). Do NOT set use_default_eng_ca. tls.server_cert/server_key is the server's OWN public TLS cert (the FQDN the car connects to); the same cert's full-chain PEM goes into the Tesla fleet CLI config.ca. Only set tls.ca_file if Tesla provides an extra CA.
